hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams consolidate suspicious activity data into audit-ready SAR drafts by linking alerts, provider inputs, case evidence, and regulatory rules into one controlled workflow.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Sar drafting slows with fragmented workflows
problem_description: Compliance teams face inefficiencies when suspicious activity cases rely on scattered alerts and disconnected provider outputs. This fragmentation creates delays in preparing clear, auditable SAR-style reports and weakens traceability between detections and reporting decisions.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links alerts, provider checks, case reviews and evidence into one operational workflow that accelerates SAR drafting and preserves a clear audit trail from detection to submission.
workflow_title: From alerts to SAR case preparation
workflow_description: SFTY organizes suspicious activity alerts into structured cases supported by evidence gathering and review workflows that prepare audit-ready SAR-style reports.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented checks. Evidence-ready SAR drafting
why_sfty_description: SFTY turns scattered alerts and provider outputs into structured cases, clear decisions, and audit-ready evidence to streamline SAR drafting and compliance reporting workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with controlled provider orchestration and audit-ready evidence to support defensible SAR preparation and scalable compliance deployment from day one.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer connecting KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, case management and reporting into structured workflows for regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support SAR drafting workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures suspicious activity cases by linking alerts, evidence and regulatory rules into draft SAR narratives for review and internal reporting.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case documents and provider outputs to support audit readiness and defensible review of compliance processes.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects and orchestrates outputs from existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one operational compliance workflow.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace onboarding or KYC providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing providers and turns their outputs into structured reviews and reports without replacing underlying onboarding or KYC systems.
final_title: Structure SAR drafting workflows with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects suspicious activity alerts, case evidence and regulatory inputs into audit-ready SAR drafts for VASP compliance teams.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
